summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ShelterLink review collection integration and UI changes. All requested features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Navbar has NO Back button anywhere (confirmed)
Listings page has NO Grid/Map toggle buttons (confirmed)
Listings page review count correct from reviews collection (shows '5.0 (1)')
Listing detail review count correct (shows '(1 reviews)')
Listing detail shows reviews with seeker photo, name, stars, and comment
Backend GET /api/listings returns reviews from reviews collection
Backend GET /api/listings/{id} returns last 5 reviews with seeker_photo and seeker_name
Frontend-backend integration for reviews working correctly
